subject: inputs to policy-handler blueprint
commit_message:
inputs to policy-handler blueprint

- changed the inputs to k8s policy-handler blueprint
  to use https in url to deployment-handler
- using port 8443 instead of 8188

Change-Id: I7920b31853ef92716cacf7bbd45fa9e16387373b
Signed-off-by: Alex Shatov <alexs@att.com>
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-851

Patch Set 2:

@Borislav - in your status you have the only service failing
onap dep-service-change-handler-59f5b8fb8c-rbh6c 0/1 CrashLoopBackOff

That is totally not related to the policy-handler input changes in this review.

Patch Set 2:

My concern is that robot healthcheck of DCAE fails.

Patch Set 2: -Code-Review

@Borislav - The sevice-change handler has dependency on DMAAP-MR, is that stable in your setup?

Patch Set 2:

> @Borislav - The sevice-change handler has dependency on DMAAP-MR,

I redeployed the setup, without this patch and it is stable.
I will redeploy again with this patch and check.
